channel.title: AI Agent on 维唯为为
channel.description: Recent content in AI Agent on 维唯为为

item.title: Agent Harness: A Portable Context System for Local AI Agents
item.description: A public architecture note about building a local-first, versioned context system for AI agents with projectized operations, skills, workflows, a compiled LLM Wiki, and controlled execution.

item.title: Agent Harness：为本地 AI 助手构建可迁移的上下文系统
item.description: 一篇面向公开读者的 Agent Harness 架构说明，介绍本地优先的 AI Agent 上下文系统、项目化运维、技能、工作流、LLM Wiki、自我进化和受控执行模式。
